reviews.comment:
Como siempre un placer cargar nafta en este lugar, funciona la app cosa que no sucede en todos lados. Buena atención, lo único que se acumulan muchos autos pero debe ser por el tamaño de la gasolinera que solo tiene 4 surtidores.

(Translated by Google)
As always, it's a pleasure to fill up at this location. The app works, which isn't the case everywhere. The service is good, but the number of cars is very high, but that must be due to the size of the station, which only has four pumps.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5cnBfV1BnEAE

reviews.comment:
Está mal diseñada. Tienen dos surtidores, uno adelante del otro. Tardas 80 años en cargar.

(Translated by Google)
It's poorly designed. They have two pumps, one in front of the other. It takes forever to fill up.
